title: ZH-25 Questor-class light freighter

{{Quote|While other spacers are grounded in the hangar, you'll still be making money!|[[Starfeld Industries/Legends|Starfeld Industries]] advertisement for the ZH-25|<ref name="BG">{{JournalCite|5|A Buyer's Guide to Alternative Starships}}</ref>}}
The [[Starfeld Industries/Legends|Starfeld]] '''ZH-25 ''Questor''-class light freighter''' was a light freighter with [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] range.

==Characteristics==
[[File:ZH-25_Questor.jpg|thumb|left|Exterior view of the popular Questor model.]]
The ZH-25 was inspired by the massive success that the earlier [[Z-10 Seeker-class scout ship|Z-10 Seeker]] model had spawned, and was in many ways an improvement of that model as it provided more cargo space, better life support (involving no less than fifty-five different bio-technologies) and better armaments.

The Questor model was fitted with seventy-five [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Mark IV fuel cell]]s, giving it an average endurance of almost three standard months.<ref name="BG" /> Instead of the [[Novaldex/Legends|Novaldex]] [[JV-71 ion engine]] of the Z-10, the ZH-25 was fitted with the more powerful [[JV-74 ion engine]] which had three additional collision tube pairs, but given its relatively larger size and weight, the ZH-25 was slightly slower in sub-light than the Z-10.<ref name="SS" />

The ZH-25 was armed with twin fire-linked pulse lasers of [[Taim & Bak/Legends|Taim & Bak's]] design, which were located on either side of the main fuselage of the ship near the cargo pods. They only fired to the front of the freighter, but the ship was maneuverable enough to allow the pilot to get into position for a shot.<ref name="BG" /> The ship was also equipped with a [[Sirplex/Legends|Sirplex]] [[P-12 shield generator]].<ref name="SS" /> In addition to the standard armaments, weapons modifications were quite common, one of the most popular ones being forward [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers and rear [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser turrets]].<ref name="BG" />

All the improvements came at the cost of the sensor system, as the Questor model was equipped with the slightly weak [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] sensor package.<ref name="SS" />

[[File:Starfeld_ZH-25_Questor_deckplan.jpg|thumb|Deckplan of the Questor model.]]
